evals.prompt: Run project-init for a new Flutter app in /tmp/project_init_cubit_dio. Use Cubit, Dio, standard flavors, languages en and uk, splash and launcher icons enabled, initial feature home.
evals.expected_output: A generated GoGoBag-style Clean Architecture baseline with project-scoped Claude and Codex subagents, Cubit state foundation, Dio network foundation, standard flavor placeholders, splash/icon configs, docs, and dependency audit guidance.

evals.prompt: Initialize /tmp/project_init_riverpod_minimal with project-init. Use Riverpod, no Dio, no flavors, English only, no splash, no launcher icons, initial feature dashboard.
evals.expected_output: A minimal generated baseline with Riverpod state foundation, no Dio files or dependencies, no flavor setup, no splash/icon config, no local database mention, and passing verification steps where possible.

evals.prompt: Run project-init on /tmp/project_init_custom_flavors with Cubit, no Dio, custom flavors alpha,beta, languages en,uk, splash and launcher icons enabled.
evals.expected_output: A generated baseline with custom flavor entrypoints, flavorizr placeholders for alpha and beta, per-flavor splash and icon config files, Cubit foundation, no Dio files or dependencies, and dependency audit output.
